title: psila densa
intro: Psila densa, also known as the black medic or medick, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is native to Europe and Asia but has been naturalized in North America and other parts of the world. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Psila densa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits, such as promoting digestion, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system.
